narrative: BoJ June summary confirms broad support for further hikes as conditions remain accommodative, yet USD/JPY holds at 161.56 on the 275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. Risk aversion firmed the dollar as equities slide; gold lower -1.56% near $4,085; equities -1.44%; DXY -0.01%; VIX 19.5. AUD/USD retreats to 0.6913 ahead of May CPI data as inflation relief bets build. Watch Australia CPI at 01:30 UTC.
